node.title: Uber SDE-1 India OA | Interview Call Updates (13 August)

article.title: Uber SDE-1 India OA | Interview Call Updates (13 August)
article.content:
Anyone here received an interview call after the Uber SDE-1 India OA held on 13 August? The test had 3 medium–hard questions. If you solved all 3 with zero plagiarism and have received an interview update, DM me.

Stage 1: Done got shortlisted

Stage 2: Coding BPS Round (1 hr)

45 min: General coding

15 min: High-Level Design

Stage 3: Business Interviews (3 x 1 hr)

Coding – DSA problems

Low-Level Design

Collaboration & Leadership

post.content: I did not get any interview update, solved all 3 without plagiarism

The BPS round is scheduled for 20th August as per the mail, so most probably we will be getting an update on 18th Aug (because of the long weekend).\n\nBTW, the BPS round, is it kind of an interview thing or more of an assessment, from what I researched it seems like it\'s going to be similar like the first OA round with some additional HLD questions.
What can we expect in Stage-2 interview or OA kind of thing again ?
When did you get the mail?
